steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } window.__artifactDownloadCapture = { filename: '', payload: '', mimeType: '' }; const originalCreate = URL.createObjectURL.bind(URL); URL.createObjectURL = (blob) => { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.mimeType = blob.type || ''; blob.text().then((text) => { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload = text; }); return originalCreate(blob); }; const originalClick = HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click; HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = function() { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.filename = this.download || ''; return originalClick.call(this); }; })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo
Selected entry: Forecasting Inventory Top Channels Q3

steps.expression: (() => { const text = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Selected entry: Forecasting Inventory Top Channels Q3') && text.includes('Template: Forecast Inventory Brief'); })()

steps.text: Get ReportDocument response: Forecasting Inventory Top Channels Q3
Reopened ReportDocument Forecasting Inventory Top Channels Q3 for editing.

steps.expression: (() => { const reopened = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Reopened ReportDocument: Forecasting Inventory Top Channels Q3')); if (!reopened) { return false; } const text = reopened.innerText || reopened.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Review export') || text.includes('Inspect export'); })()

(() => { const reopened = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('Reopened ReportDocument: Forecasting Inventory Top Channels Q3')); if (!reopened) { throw new Error('Reopened section not found.'); } const button = Array.from(reopened.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => { const text = (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim(); return text === 'Inspect export' || text === 'Review export'; }); if (!button) { throw new Error('Inspect export button not found in reopened section.'); } button.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const summary = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label="Reopened export request summary"]')).find(Boolean); if (!summary) { return false; } const container = summary.closest('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice'); const pre = container?.querySelector('pre'); if (!pre) { return false; } try { const parsed = JSON.parse(pre.textContent || '{}'); const reportPrint = parsed?.reportPrint; if (!reportPrint) { return false; } const pages = Array.isArray(reportPrint.pages) ? reportPrint.pages : []; const pageOne = pages.find((page) => page?.number === 1); const pageTwo = pages.find((page) => page?.number === 2); const pageOneElements = Array.isArray(pageOne?.elements) ? pageOne.elements : []; const pageTwoElements = Array.isArray(pageTwo?.elements) ? pageTwo.elements : []; const scope = pageOneElements.find((element) => element?.id === 'scopeFilters__title_0'); const table = pageOneElements.find((element) => element?.id === 'primaryTable__title_0'); const narrative = pageTwoElements.find((element) => element?.id === 'narrativeIntro__title_0'); const kpi = pageTwoElements.find((element) => element?.id === 'headlineKpi__title_0'); const diagnostics = Array.isArray(reportPrint?.diagnostics) ? reportPrint.diagnostics : []; return reportPrint.pageGeometry?.width === 792 && reportPrint.pageGeometry?.height === 612 && pages.length === 2 && !diagnostics.some((entry) => entry?.code === 'unsupportedReportPrintLayoutSize') && scope?.box?.x === 36 && scope?.box?.y === 84 && table?.box?.x === 36 && table?.box?.y === 212 && narrative?.box?.x === 36 && narrative?.box?.y === 448 && narrative?.box?.width === 348 && kpi?.box?.x === 408 && kpi?.box?.y === 448 && kpi?.box?.width === 348; } catch (_) { return false; } })()

(() => { const summary = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label="Reopened export request summary"]')).find(Boolean); if (!summary) { throw new Error('Reopened export request summary not found.'); } const container = summary.closest('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice'); const button = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Download export request')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Download export request button not found.'); } button.click(); return true; })()
window.__artifactDownloadCapture && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.filename === 'Forecasting Inventory Top Channels Q3-savedPayload-pdf-export-request.json'

(() => { const raw = window.__artifactDownloadCapture?.payload || ''; if (!raw) { return false; } try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); const reportPrint = parsed?.reportPrint; const pages = Array.isArray(reportPrint?.pages) ? reportPrint.pages : []; const pageOne = pages.find((page) => page?.number === 1); const pageTwo = pages.find((page) => page?.number === 2); const pageOneElements = Array.isArray(pageOne?.elements) ? pageOne.elements : []; const pageTwoElements = Array.isArray(pageTwo?.elements) ? pageTwo.elements : []; const scope = pageOneElements.find((element) => element?.id === 'scopeFilters__title_0'); const table = pageOneElements.find((element) => element?.id === 'primaryTable__title_0'); const narrative = pageTwoElements.find((element) => element?.id === 'narrativeIntro__title_0'); const kpi = pageTwoElements.find((element) => element?.id === 'headlineKpi__title_0'); const diagnostics = Array.isArray(reportPrint?.diagnostics) ? reportPrint.diagnostics : []; return reportPrint?.pageGeometry?.width === 792 && reportPrint?.pageGeometry?.height === 612 && pages.length === 2 && !diagnostics.some((entry) => entry?.code === 'unsupportedReportPrintLayoutSize') && scope?.box?.x === 36 && scope?.box?.y === 84 && table?.box?.x === 36 && table?.box?.y === 212 && narrative?.box?.x === 36 && narrative?.box?.y === 448 && narrative?.box?.width === 348 && kpi?.box?.x === 408 && kpi?.box?.y === 448 && kpi?.box?.width === 348; } catch (_) { return false; } })()
